target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Target is an armored vehicle (tank) fully submerged in mud and water; no visible holes, scorching, or blown-off components; all major components appear intact and structurally sound despite being immobilized.

summary: One military equipment target, an armored vehicle (tank), is present and assessed as NO DAMAGE, CONFIRMED, due to being fully submerged in mud and water with no visible damage. The scene depicts a single tank stranded in a muddy, waterlogged ditch beside tall reeds, with no other relevant targets. The functional impact is immobilization, as the vehicle is stuck and unable to operate.
